blocks.text: Ronde van Vlaanderen and Texas Open Final Round Headline a Monster Sunday

Seven Norwegians chase cobblestone glory at one of cycling's greatest Monuments. Meanwhile, Robert MacIntyre holds a two-shot lead at TPC San Antonio — can Ventura or Reitan mount a Sunday charge ahead of the Masters?
🚴 Tour of Flanders (Ronde van Vlaanderen) — Wærenskjold, Bystrøm, Hoelgaard and four more Norwegians ride Antwerp to Oudenaarde
⛳ Valero Texas Open final round — MacIntyre leads at -15, Ventura & Reitan hunting Masters tune-up glory
